description: MPToken issuance commands — create, destroy, set, authorize, and query Multi-Purpose Token issuances on the XRP Ledger

userStories.title: mptoken issuance create command
userStories.description: As a token issuer, I want to define a new MPT issuance from the CLI so I can issue fungible tokens with customizable properties.
acceptanceCriteria: Read MPTokenIssuanceCreate docs at https://github.com/XRPLF/xrpl-dev-portal/blob/master/docs/references/protocol/transactions/types/mptokenissuancecreate.md before implementing
Create src/commands/mptoken.ts and register it in src/commands/index.ts and src/index.ts

xrpl mptoken issuance create with: --asset-scale <n> (optional, 0-255, default 0), --max-amount <string> (optional UInt64 base-10 string), --transfer-fee <n> (optional, 0-50000), --flags <list> (optional, comma-separated: can-lock,require-auth,can-escrow,can-trade,can-transfer,can-clawback)
--metadata <string> (auto hex-encoded), --metadata-hex <hex> (raw hex), --metadata-file <path> (file contents hex-encoded) — all mutually exclusive
Standard key material options: --seed, --mnemonic, --account/--keystore/--password
Standard output options: --node, --json, --dry-run, --no-wait
After successful create, print MPTokenIssuanceID prominently
CLI exits with error if an unknown flag name is given in --flags
CLI exits with error if --transfer-fee is set without can-transfer in --flags
CLI exits with error if more than one of --metadata, --metadata-hex, --metadata-file is provided
CLI exits with error if --metadata-file path does not exist
tests/e2e/mptoken/mptoken.validation.test.ts: unknown flag name, transfer-fee without can-transfer, multiple metadata flags (no network)
tests/e2e/mptoken/mptoken.create.test.ts: create basic issuance, create with flags and transfer fee, create with --metadata; verify via mptoken issuance get; --json, --dry-run
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: mptoken issuance destroy and mptoken issuance set commands
userStories.description: As a token issuer, I want to delete an MPT issuance and lock/unlock token balances so I can manage the issuance lifecycle and compliance controls.
acceptanceCriteria: Read MPTokenIssuanceDestroy docs at https://github.com/XRPLF/xrpl-dev-portal/blob/master/docs/references/protocol/transactions/types/mptokenissuancedestroy.md before implementing
Read MPTokenIssuanceSet docs at https://github.com/XRPLF/xrpl-dev-portal/blob/master/docs/references/protocol/transactions/types/mptokenissuanceset.md before implementing
xrpl mptoken issuance destroy <issuance-id>: positional MPTokenIssuanceID argument, standard key material and output options
xrpl mptoken issuance set <issuance-id>: positional MPTokenIssuanceID, --lock (boolean), --unlock (boolean, mutually exclusive with --lock), --holder <address> (optional, per-holder operation)
CLI exits with error if neither --lock nor --unlock is provided for issuance set
CLI exits with error if both --lock and --unlock are provided
tests/e2e/mptoken/mptoken.issuance.test.ts: create issuance, lock globally, unlock globally, lock per-holder, destroy issuance; --json, --dry-run
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: mptoken authorize command
userStories.description: As a token holder or issuer, I want to opt in to holding an MPT or grant/revoke allow-list permissions so I can receive and manage MPT balances.
acceptanceCriteria: Read MPTokenAuthorize docs at https://github.com/XRPLF/xrpl-dev-portal/blob/master/docs/references/protocol/transactions/types/mptokenauthorize.md before implementing
xrpl mptoken authorize <issuance-id>: positional MPTokenIssuanceID, --holder <address> (optional, issuer-side only), --unauthorize (boolean flag to revoke instead of grant)
Standard key material and output options
tests/e2e/mptoken/mptoken.authorize.test.ts: holder opts in, holder opts out (balance must be zero), issuer authorizes holder on require-auth issuance, issuer revokes; --json, --dry-run
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: mptoken issuance list and mptoken issuance get commands
userStories.description: As a token issuer or developer, I want to query MPT issuances so I can verify properties and track issuance state.
acceptanceCriteria: xrpl mptoken issuance list <address> using account_objects RPC with type: 'mpt_issuance'
mptoken issuance list default output: each issuance on its own line with ID, AssetScale, MaximumAmount, OutstandingAmount, active flags
Shows 'No MPT issuances.' if the account has none
xrpl mptoken issuance get <issuance-id> using ledger_entry RPC with { mpt_issuance: issuanceId }
mptoken issuance get default output: ID, Issuer, AssetScale, MaximumAmount, OutstandingAmount, TransferFee, flags (decoded names), Metadata (decoded from hex to UTF-8 if valid, else raw hex)
--json outputs raw JSON on both commands
--node supported on both commands
tests/e2e/mptoken/mptoken.query.test.ts: create issuance, verify mptoken issuance list shows it, verify mptoken issuance get shows correct properties; --json
Typecheck passes
